name: Nova Shield
description: Nova Shields detonate when their capacity hits zero, releasing an elemental burst around you that damages nearby foes. They suit close-range builds that stay on top of enemies and can turn shield breaks into crowd damage or a quick Second Wind setup.
notes: A nova cannot trigger again until the shield has fully recharged, so recharge delay, recharge rate and staying in range determine how often it pays off.

special.description: On break, unleashes an elemental nova that damages enemies close to the wearer.
